channel.title: NetNewsWire Betas
channel.description: Most recent NetNewsWire changes with links to updates.

item.title: NetNewsWire 7.1b4
item.description:
• Removed images from items in contextual menus in sidebar and timeline
  • Added more detail to the Activity Log: download sizes for image and HTML‑metadata downloads, and a note when a download was served from the cache (instead of over the web)

item.title: NetNewsWire 6.2.1
item.description:
Changes since 6.2:

  • Fixed some crashing bugs
  • Fixed a bug where, on some Macs, the user couldn’t select an OPML file to import
